regions.us-ports: Today Miami is reporting SE 5kt, overcast, 14% rain probability; light SE winds and persistent overcast support normal embarkation and disembarkation operations with minimal wind-related tendering restrictions. A Heat Advisory is in effect for Port Canaveral, with heat index values up to 110°F, posing a serious risk to passengers during outdoor shore excursions. A Heat Advisory is in effect for Charleston and Savannah, with heat index values up to 110°F, posing a serious risk to passengers during outdoor shore excursions. An Extreme Heat Watch is in effect for Los Angeles and Long Beach, with temperatures up to 95°F, posing a serious risk to passengers during outdoor shore excursions. Through the next 24 hours Miami is forecast SE 13kt with rain showers and 14% rain probability, and Port Everglades should expect a similar SE/E 13kt profile that may modestly raise chop during launch and recovery of shore excursion tenders.
